2025-26 Chicago Bulls Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 31-51, Finished 12th in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: Billy Donovan (31-51)

Executive: Artūras Karnišovas

PTS/G: 116.3 (12th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 121.5 (28th of 30)

SRS: -5.09 (22nd of 30) Pace: 102.5 (2nd of 30)

Off Rtg: 113.0 (23rd of 30) Def Rtg: 118.1 (22nd of 30) Net Rtg: -5.1 (22nd of 30)

Expected W-L: 29-53 (22nd of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000, Over-Under 33.5

Arena: United Center Attendance: 829,997 (1st of 30)

This statistic adjusts for the fact that a 3-point field goal is worth one more point than a 2-point field goal.

A measure of shooting efficiency that takes into account 2-point field goals, 3-point field goals, and free throws.

An estimate of the percentage of available rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Steal Pct

Steal Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent possessions that end with a steal by the player while they were on the floor.

Block Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked by the player while they were on the floor.

An estimate of turnovers committed per 100 plays.

Isaac Okoro 8.3 (16th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.
